summary.zh: 根据导航方向匹配进入和离开方向，维持前后关系。
summary.en: Match enter and exit directions to navigation order and preserve context.

definition.zh: 前进时内容沿一个方向滑动，返回时沿相反方向滑动，让导航具备方向感。
definition.en: Navigation motion uses the route direction to choose opposing travel paths for forward and reverse actions.

description.zh: 控制一次动效完成所需的时间。
description.en: Controls the time required for one motion cycle.

description.zh: 控制元素移动的空间距离。
description.en: Controls how far the element travels.

description.zh: 控制速度随时间变化的方式。
description.en: Controls how velocity changes over time.

purpose.zh: 用相反方向表达前进与返回，维持导航序列和层级关系。
purpose.en: Use opposite directions for forward and back navigation to preserve sequence and hierarchy.

frequency.zh: 适合中频步骤流、分页和历史导航；同级标签切换只在方向有意义时使用。
frequency.en: Use for medium-frequency step flows, pagination, and history navigation; apply to peer tabs only when direction is meaningful.

trigger.zh: 由 next、previous、浏览器返回或有序索引变化触发。
trigger.en: Trigger from next, previous, browser back, or ordered-index changes.

enterExit.zh: 前进时新内容从前方进入、旧内容向后方退出；返回时完整反转。
enterExit.en: On forward navigation, new content enters from ahead as old content exits behind; reverse the mapping on back.

interruptibility.zh: 连续导航以当前进度接管，并只渲染当前位置与最新目标。
interruptibility.en: Rapid navigation takes over at current progress and renders only the current and latest target.

gestureRules.zh: 滑动翻页时方向跟随手势；按钮与键盘导航沿用同一空间规则。
gestureRules.en: Swipe pagination follows gesture direction; buttons and keyboard navigation use the same spatial rule.

reducedMotion.zh: 改用短交叉淡化，同时保留前进、返回标签和焦点位置。
reducedMotion.en: Use a short crossfade while preserving forward/back labels and focus position.

reviewNotes.zh: 测试 RTL 语言中的前进方向。
reviewNotes.en: Test forward direction under RTL layouts.

reviewNotes.zh: 确认视觉顺序、DOM 顺序和历史顺序一致。
reviewNotes.en: Align visual order, DOM order, and navigation history.
